steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table, then plug in the requested input. The output is $610$, so the answer is $610$. This is just a one-row lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the table value.

steps.title: Substitute x = 5 into the function
steps.content: To find $f(5)$, substitute $x = 5$ into the definition $f(x) = 128x - 30$: $$f(5) = 128(5) - 30$$
